title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
